title: ligularia pterodonta
intro: Ligularia pterodonta, also known as the flowering ligularia, is a type of flowering plant native to China and Japan. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Ligularia pterodonta include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
